focus: Fix GlowingEffect on ModuleHubCards — overflow-hidden was clipping the glow border
notes: S0091: Fixed GlowingEffect not showing on ModuleHubCards. Root cause: overflow-hidden on button element clipped the glow border (which uses -inset-px). Fix: wrapped button in a relative rounded-2xl div and moved GlowingEffect there, matching the pattern used in 88+ other components. TypeScript clean.
